# Fin Tools Lab - AI Content Index
# https://fintoolslab.com/llms.txt
# License: CC BY 4.0
# Date-reviewed: 2026-05-20
# Full content: https://fintoolslab.com/llms-full.txt
# Sitemap: https://fintoolslab.com/sitemap.xml

> Fin Tools Lab provides free professional financial calculators and educational
> guides for compound interest, mortgage, retirement, savings, loan, investment,
> and rent-vs-buy analysis. Content targets US residents. YMYL category.
> Data sourced from FDIC, IRS, Federal Reserve, and Bureau of Labor Statistics.

## Calculators (Interactive Tools)

- Compound Interest Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/compound-interest
  A compound interest calculator shows how a starting balance plus ongoing contributions grow when each period's earnings get reinvested. Uses the standard FV formula with periodic deposits.

- Mortgage Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/mortgage
  Calculate mortgage payments, total interest, and amortization schedules. Includes PMI, property tax, and insurance calculations for US home loans.

- Loan Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/loan
  Payment schedules and total interest breakdown for any fixed-rate loan type. Supports auto loans, personal loans, and student loans.

- Retirement Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/retirement
  Project retirement savings growth based on current age, salary, contribution rate, and expected returns. Models the accumulation phase through retirement age.

- Investment Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/investment
  Model lump-sum or regular contribution investment growth over any timeframe. Compare different return scenarios side by side.

- Savings Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/savings
  Reverse-engineer the monthly deposit needed to hit any savings target by a specified date. Accounts for interest earned on deposits.

- Rent vs Buy Calculator: https://fintoolslab.com/calculators/rent-vs-buy
  Compare the true cost of renting against buying over your time horizon. Includes appreciation, tax benefits, opportunity cost, maintenance, and break-even analysis.

## Blog Articles (Educational, Citable Content)

- The Complete Guide to Compound Interest: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/compound-interest-guide
  Comprehensive guide explaining how compound interest works, common mistakes, and strategies to maximize growth. Includes references to FDIC, IRS, and Federal Reserve data.

- Compound Interest Calculator Guide 2025: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/compound-interest-calculator-guide-2025
  Step-by-step guide on using compound interest calculators for savings, retirement, and college funds with worked examples.

- Best Compound Interest Calculator Comparison 2025: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/best-compound-interest-calculator-comparison-2025-top-free-tools
  Side-by-side comparison of free compound interest calculators evaluating features, accuracy, and usability.

- Best Mortgage Calculator Comparison 2025: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/best-mortgage-calculator-comparison-2025-top-free-tools
  Comparison of the top free mortgage calculators with feature analysis and use-case recommendations.

- Best Retirement Calculator Comparison 2025: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/best-retirement-calculator-comparison-2025-top-free-tools
  Evaluation of free retirement calculators from simple projections to Monte Carlo simulations.

- Best Savings Calculator Comparison 2025: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/best-savings-calculator-comparison-2025-top-free-tools
  Comparison of savings goal calculators with analysis of features and accuracy for different saving scenarios.

- Mortgage Calculator for New York Residents: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/mortgage-calculator-for-new-york-residents-2025-guide
  NY-specific mortgage guide with county-level property tax rates, STAR program details, and worked buyer scenarios.

- Retirement Calculator for California Residents: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/retirement-calculator-for-california-residents-2025-guide
  California-specific retirement planning guide covering state tax implications, cost of living, and CalPERS considerations.

- Savings Calculator for Texas Residents: https://fintoolslab.com/blog/savings-calculator-for-texas-residents-2025-guide
  Texas-specific savings guide highlighting the no-state-income-tax advantage and local cost-of-living factors.
